words.example: I want to improve my English skills.
words.exampleKo: 나는 내 영어 실력을 향상시키고 싶다.

words.example: She suggested going to the park.
The teacher explained the rule again.
Can you describe the man you saw?
words.exampleKo: 네가 본 남자를 묘사할 수 있니?

words.example: Scientists discovered a new star.
Edison invented the light bulb.
The company developed a new game.
This factory produces cars.
The school provides free lunch.
I received a letter from my friend.
He accepted my invitation.
She refused to answer the question.
My parents allowed me to go camping.
words.exampleKo: 부모님은 내가 캠핑 가는 것을 허락하셨다.

words.example: You should avoid junk food.
The game was canceled because of rain.
We celebrated my mother's birthday.
Don't compare yourself with others.
He always complains about homework.
The rain continued all day.
The cat disappeared into the dark.
I didn't expect to see you here.
words.exampleKo: 여기서 너를 볼 줄은 예상하지 못했다.

words.example: It is hard to express my feelings in words.
People gathered in front of the stage.
I realized my mistake too late.
words.exampleKo: 나는 내 실수를 너무 늦게 깨달았다.

words.example: Can you recommend a good book?
words.exampleKo: 좋은 책 한 권을 추천해 줄 수 있니?

words.example: We should reduce plastic waste.
She solved the puzzle in five minutes.
If you keep trying, you will succeed.
Camels can survive without water for days.
words.exampleKo: 낙타는 며칠 동안 물 없이 살아남을 수 있다.

words.example: Please translate this sentence into Korean.
She has the ability to make people laugh.
words.exampleKo: 그녀는 사람들을 웃게 만드는 능력이 있다.

words.example: My teacher gave me useful advice.
words.exampleKo: 선생님이 나에게 유용한 조언을 해 주셨다.

words.example: This is your last chance.
The main character of the story is a boy.
We should help our local community.
The old car is still in good condition.
words.exampleKo: 그 오래된 차는 여전히 좋은 상태이다.

words.example: It takes courage to say sorry first.
words.exampleKo: 먼저 미안하다고 말하는 데는 용기가 필요하다.

words.example: Bowing is a Korean custom.
Success comes from effort.
Music can express many emotions.
words.exampleKo: 음악은 많은 감정을 표현할 수 있다.

words.example: My goal is to read fifty books this year.
words.exampleKo: 내 목표는 올해 50권의 책을 읽는 것이다.

words.example: You can find more information online.
words.exampleKo: 온라인에서 더 많은 정보를 찾을 수 있다.

words.example: Books give us knowledge.
Everyone must follow the law.
Don't be afraid of making mistakes.
We enjoyed the beauty of nature.
In my opinion, this movie is boring.
I have a good relationship with my parents.
words.exampleKo: 나는 부모님과 좋은 관계를 맺고 있다.

words.example: This sofa is very comfortable.
Children are curious about everything.
I was nervous before the interview.
Please be patient and wait for your turn.
He is always polite to older people.
Air pollution is a serious problem.
Your bag is similar to mine.
The store sells various kinds of snacks.
words.exampleKo: 그 가게는 다양한 종류의 간식을 판다.

words.example: Actually, I have never been there.
words.exampleKo: 사실 나는 그곳에 가 본 적이 없다.

words.example: I like fruit, especially strawberries.
words.exampleKo: 나는 과일을 좋아하는데, 특히 딸기를 좋아한다.

words.example: It will probably rain tomorrow.
We can't live without water.
words.exampleKo: 우리는 물 없이 살 수 없다.
